org.docgene.model

Class XMLJavaAPI

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractLink
      • org.docgene.model.AbstractAPI
        • org.docgene.model.XMLJavaAPI
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ElementReference, ExternalLink, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLJavaAPI
extends AbstractAPI
    Represent a link to a Java API.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static short API_PATH_CLASS
      The default value, only the class name is presented.
      static short API_PATH_FULL
      The full class path is presented.
      static short API_PATH_MEMBER
      Only the member is presented.
      static short TYPE_CLASS
      The default type, for class declarations.
      static short TYPE_MODULE
      The type for module declarations.
      static short TYPE_PACKAGE
      The type for package declarations.

      • Fields inherited from class org.docgene.model.AbstractAPI

        altPath, altText, api, isResolved, location, member, path, text, url

        isAbsolute, isValid

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      XMLJavaAPI()
      Create a Java API link to the default JavaSE API.
      XMLJavaAPI(java.lang.String api)
      Create a Java API link.
      XMLJavaAPI(java.net.URL location)
      Create a Java API link.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Bind the API path URL.

      Return the API link path type presentation.

      Return the type of the API.

      Return the declaration ID of the element.
      java.lang.String getModule()
      Return the module.
      java.lang.String getText()
      Return the link description text.
      boolean hasLibrary()
      Return true if the Java API has a stored corresponding library.
      boolean isAnyJDKAPI()
      Return true if the API is a JDK API for Java 8 (JavaSE or JavaFX).
      boolean isClassAPIType()
      Return true if the API points to a class.
      boolean isJDK8API()
      Return true if the API is a JDK API for Java 8 (JavaSE or JavaFX).
      boolean isPostJava10()
      Return true if the XML java API refer to a post Java 10 API.
      boolean isResolved()
      Return true if the API is resolved.

      Set if the API link path type presentation.

      Set the type of the API.

      Set the module.

      • isPostJava10

        public boolean isPostJava10()
        Return true if the XML java API refer to a post Java 10 API.
        Returns:

        public java.lang.String getDeclaration()
        Return the declaration ID of the element.

      • isAnyJDKAPI

        public boolean isAnyJDKAPI()
        Return true if the API is a JDK API for Java 8 (JavaSE or JavaFX).
        Returns:
        true if the API is a JDK API for Java 8

      • isJDK8API

        public boolean isJDK8API()
        Return true if the API is a JDK API for Java 8 (JavaSE or JavaFX).
        Returns:
        true if the API is a JDK API for Java 8

      • setAPIType

        public void setAPIType(short apiType)
        Set the type of the API. The valid values are:
        • TYPE_CLASS: the default value, the API specifies a class
        • TYPE_PACKAGE: the API specifies a package
        • TYPE_MODULE: the API specifies a module
        Parameters:
        apiType - the type of the API

      • isClassAPIType

        public boolean isClassAPIType()
        Return true if the API points to a class.
        Returns:
        true if the API points to a class

      • getAPIType

        public short getAPIType()
        Return the type of the API.
        Returns:
        the type of the API

      • setAPIPathType

        public void setAPIPathType(short type)
        Set if the API link path type presentation. The valid values are:
        • API_PATH_CLASS: the default value, only the class name is presented
        • API_PATH_FULL: the full class path is presented
        • API_PATH_MEMBER: only the member is presented
        Parameters:
        type - the API path type

      • getAPIPathType

        public short getAPIPathType()
        Return the API link path type presentation.
        Returns:
        the API link path type presentation
        See Also:
        setAPIPathType(short)

      • setModule

        public void setModule(java.lang.String module)
        Set the module.
        Parameters:
        module - the module

        Return the module.

        the module

                 java.lang.String altText,
                 boolean hasLibrary)
        Bind the API path URL.

        text - the text
        altText - the alt text
        hasLibrary - true if the API has an associated library
